whyChoose.item1: E-commerce boxes (F 703) for various products ordered/delivered by courier

orderSummary.title: Order Summary
orderSummary.consentPhone: I hereby give my consent to Boxmag to process my personal data in the form of the telephone number I have provided in order to contact me regarding my enquiry and to present me with an offer using telecommunications terminal equipment and automatic calling systems within the meaning of the Telecommunications Law.
orderSummary.consentEmail: I agree that Boxmag may process my personal data in the form of e-mail address in order to send me commercial offers regarding products and services offered by Boxmag via electronic means of communication, pursuant to the provisions of art. 10 section 1 and 2 of the Act on Electronic Provision of Services.
about.aboutP1: BOXMAG is an online store supported by a family business with over 30 years of experience in the production of cardboard packaging for which values and traditions matter. We have always believed in the values of the company based on relationships with our employees, customers and suppliers. We have a dynamic team, passionate about new ideas in the production of E-COMMERCE boxes and that feels the pulse of the times.
about.aboutP2: BOXFIX®, E-COMMERCE boxes are innovative solutions for sending goods by courier in a safe and comfortable manner.
about.qualityTitle: Boxmag – we care about the highest quality of our products
about.qualityText: We know how important the first impression is in the buying process. In online sales, boxes represent the first impression to create delight and positive emotions in customers when opening and unpacking the goods from E-COMMERCE boxes. Responsibility and sustainability are values that guide our business. We assume this responsibility both for the environment and society. We respect the principles of the organization Forest Stewardship Council.
about.discoverText: Stop sending air – to reduce costs and empty space during transport and use a custom-made E-COMMERCE box, personalized with your logo. BOXFIX® Return – for outward and return shipment.
about.visitMore: Visit our website to learn more
shop.slogan: - all fix, all pack, with self-adhesive closure and tear strip
shop.discoverLine2: Order NOW and PACK ON TIME.
shop.boxfixDescription: We offer BOXFIX® a wide range of Eco-friendly shipping boxes for E-commerce and more, direct from the manufacturer - for over 30 years. BOXFIX® is very popular in the next industry: clothing, footwear, cosmetics, electronics, automotive. Thanks to the automatic bottom and self-adhesive closure the e-commerce boxes can be set up and closed three time faster than standard boxes. Minimum effort- maximum result.

delivery.title: Delivery of goods
delivery.i1: Delivery of goods is limited to EU Countries. The delivery address must be within the territory of the European Union.
delivery.i2: Delivery costs are indicated when you place your order and are calculated and shown in the shopping cart before payment.
delivery.i3: Free delivery is valid for orders shipped to: Romania, Austria, Germany, France, Italy, Netherlands, Belgium, Croatia, Slovenia, Hungary, Bulgaria, Slovakia, Czech Republic, Poland.
delivery.i4: The condition for free delivery is placing an order with a minimum gross value of 500 RON or 100 EUR for consumer clients.
delivery.i5: Delivery of ordered Goods is carried out via:
delivery.i5a: Courier companies: GLS; DHL, DPD, FAN CURIER, CARGUS
delivery.i6: We carry out personal collection of ordered goods on working days during warehouse opening hours. Personal collection is not available on public holidays.
delivery.i7: Personal collection is possible after paying for the order and receiving an email confirmation that the order is ready for collection.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.basic.title: Basic information
privacyPolicy.basic.item1: Respecting the privacy of the individuals who have trusted Boxmag (Part of "Reko Packaging") by providing your personal data, we want to ensure that we process this data in accordance with applicable national and European regulations, while ensuring their security - confidentiality, availability, integrity, and accountability of actions. In order to ensure transparency in data processing processes, we present the principles of personal data protection applicable at Boxmag, established in accordance with the Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 27 April 2016 (General Data Protection Regulation, hereinafter referred to as "GDPR").
privacyPolicy.basic.item2.beforeEmail: Boxmag, Stefan cel Mare 131 street RO-725400 Radauti, Suceava, is the Personal Data Administrator (ADO) who determines the purposes and means of processing personal data. For matters related to the processing of your personal data, we encourage you to contact us via email at:
privacyPolicy.basic.item3: By using our websites, you may be subject to the processing of your personal data through cookies, in accordance with our Cookie Policy contained in this document.
privacyPolicy.individuals.title: Individuals whose data is processed and the method of data acquisition
privacyPolicy.individuals.item1.beforeUr: Boxmag online store offer a variety of packaging products as well as advisory services in selecting optimal packaging, available through phone contact. The products are also available for purchase online on the website
privacyPolicy.individuals.item2.intro: We process personal data of individuals who:
they are entrepreneurs, and their data comes from publicly available sources, including public registers,
They are potential clients, contractors, or suppliers who have provided us with contact details in connection with the services and products we offer.
they are our current clients, contractors, or suppliers,
act as authorized representatives of legal persons or other organizational entities.
They are the sides of applications, complaints, claims, or other letters addressed to us.
They can be recipients of marketing correspondence in accordance with the law.
privacyPolicy.purposes.title: Purposes and legal basis for processing personal data
privacyPolicy.purposes.p1.beforeBoxmag: We process personal data for the offer form of the B2B Professionals page on the website
privacyPolicy.recipients.title: Data recipients
privacyPolicy.recipients.item1.intro: In connection with the conducted activities, your data may be disclosed to the following entities:
privacyPolicy.recipients.item1.bullets.1: state organs or other entities authorized under the law,
privacyPolicy.recipients.item1.bullets.2: entities supporting our activities at our request, such as IT system suppliers, auditing entities, accounting, advisory, legal firms, and entities collaborating with us within marketing campaigns.
privacyPolicy.recipients.item1.bullets.4: to employees and coworkers acting on our behalf,
privacyPolicy.recipients.item1.bullets.5: to courier or postal companies for delivering parcels,
privacyPolicy.recipients.item1.bullets.6: external service providers to provide servicing services,
privacyPolicy.recipients.item1.bullets.7: entities acquiring receivables in order to settle debts.
privacyPolicy.recipients.item2.beforeEma: Despite our efforts, this list may not cover all entities cooperating with us, as some of them use subcontractors. If you have any questions regarding our external partners, please contact us at the following address:
privacyPolicy.rights.title: Rights related to the processing of personal data
privacyPolicy.rights.item1.intro: In the context of personal data processing, you have specific rights in accordance with the regulations on personal data protection, including the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). These rights include:
privacyPolicy.rights.access.label: Right to access data
privacyPolicy.rights.access.desc: You have the right to request confirmation from the company Boxmag whether your personal data is being processed, and to receive other essential information regarding the processing, such as purposes or categories of personal data. You may also demand a copy of your personal data to familiarize yourself with them and understand how they are being utilized by Boxmag online store and Reko Packaging, manufacturer. However, Boxmag online store and Reko Packaging, manufacturer may refuse to provide a copy of the data if it would infringe on the rights of another person.
privacyPolicy.rights.rectification.label: Right to rectification of data
privacyPolicy.rights.rectification.desc: You have the right to request Boxmag online store and Reko Packaging, manufacturer to correct your personal data if they are incorrect or incomplete. This can be done by presenting an additional statement.
privacyPolicy.rights.erasure.label: Right to erasure of data
privacyPolicy.rights.erasure.desc: allows you to request the deletion of your personal data, for example, when they are being processed illegally or when you have withdrawn your consent for their processing. However, there are circumstances in which Boxmag online store and Reko Packaging, manufacturer may refuse to delete data, for example, when they are needed to assert or defend legal claims.
privacyPolicy.rights.restriction.label: Right to restriction of processing
privacyPolicy.rights.restriction.desc: You have the right to suspend the company Boxmag from further using your personal data in specific situations, for example when the verification of your request to correct the data is ongoing. This means that Boxmag online store and Reko Packaging, manufacturer can store your personal data, but cannot actively use it.
privacyPolicy.rights.portability.label: Right to data portability
privacyPolicy.rights.portability.desc: You have the right to receive certain personal data processed by Boxmag and to reuse them with another data controller. This applies only to data that you have provided to Boxmag with consent or for the purpose of fulfilling a contract. Boxmag online store and Reko Packaging, manufacturer will provide you with a copy of the data in a machine-readable format or transfer it directly to another data controller if technically feasible. However, Boxmag online store and Reko Packaging, manufacturer may refuse to fulfill this right if it would infringe on the rights of another person.
privacyPolicy.rights.item2: If the legal basis for processing your personal data is the legitimate interests, you have the right to object to the processing of this data, especially for direct marketing purposes. However, Boxmag online store and Reko Packaging, manufacturer may continue processing the data if it has legitimate grounds for processing that outweigh your interests.
privacyPolicy.rights.item3: If the processing of your personal data is based on consent, you have the right to withdraw it at any time. Withdrawing consent does not affect the legality of the processing carried out before its withdrawal.
privacyPolicy.rights.item4: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority for personal data protection, the General Inspector for the Protection of Personal Data or their successor.
privacyPolicy.security.title: How do we ensure your privacy?
privacyPolicy.security.item1: We understand that your personal data is confidential. We comply with the laws, including the GDPR, and apply internal policies and procedures to protect your personal data.
privacyPolicy.security.item2: We have implemented technological and operational security measures to prevent the loss, misuse, alteration, or destruction of your personal data. Among these measures are encryption, appropriate access management processes, and other organizational and technical measures to ensure an adequate level of security, taking into account the nature of the personal data being processed.
privacyPolicy.security.item3: However, it is important to remember that transmitting information over the Internet carries a certain risk that cannot be completely eliminated.
privacyPolicy.security.item4: In case of any online payments, we use a secure online payment system.
privacyPolicy.mandatory.title: Is providing personal data mandatory?
privacyPolicy.mandatory.p1: Providing data is necessary for entering into agreements and settling business activities. In other cases, such as for marketing purposes, it is voluntary.
privacyPolicy.thirdCountries.title: Transferring data to third countries
privacyPolicy.thirdCountries.p1: Your data will be processed within the European Economic Area, except in situations where transferring them to third countries is necessary to perform a contract or meet legal requirements.
privacyPolicy.cookies.what.title: What are "cookies" files?
privacyPolicy.cookies.what.p1: The term "cookies" refers to computer data, especially text files, stored on end-user devices such as a computer, tablet, or smartphone. These files enable the identification of the user's device and the customization of displayed content on a website to their individual preferences. They are also used to identify the browser during the cookie file's validity period. Their application is diverse: they can be used to remember a customer's identifier on a seller's website, the current state of a shopping cart, for statistical or advertising purposes. Typically, "cookies" contain the website's name of origin, the duration of their storage on the end-user device, and a unique number.
privacyPolicy.cookies.purpose.title: What is the purpose of "cookies" files?
privacyPolicy.cookies.purpose.p1: "Cookies" files are used to customize the content of websites to the user's preferences and optimize the use of these sites. They are also used to create anonymous, aggregate statistics that help understand how users interact with websites, enabling the improvement of their structure and content without identifying the user personally.
privacyPolicy.cookies.purpose.p2.beforeU: The company Boxmag is constantly looking for innovative and effective solutions to improve user experience on its website
privacyPolicy.cookies.purpose.p2.afterUr: and to provide high-quality services. Therefore, Boxmag may use cookies to personalize searches, increase browsing speed, remember user preferences such as language, and create anonymous statistics. Some cookies, especially those used for advertising purposes, may require the user's prior consent before being installed on the device.
privacyPolicy.cookies.types.title: What types of "cookies" do we use?
privacyPolicy.cookies.types.essential.de: Essential cookies contribute to the usability of the website by enabling basic functions such as page navigation and access to secure areas of the website. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.
Statistical cookies help website owners understand how different users behave on the site by collecting and reporting anonymous information.
privacyPolicy.cookies.types.preference.d: Preference cookies enable a website to remember information that changes the look or behavior of the site, such as preferred language or region in which the user is located.
privacyPolicy.cookies.types.marketing.de: Marketing cookies are used to track users on websites. The goal is to display ads that are relevant and interesting to individual users, and therefore more valuable for third-party website publishers and advertisers.
privacyPolicy.cookies.management.title: Cookie management
privacyPolicy.cookies.management.p1.befo: To obtain a detailed list of cookie stored by Boxmag Online store / Reko Packaging company or its partner on the website
privacyPolicy.cookies.management.p1.afte: , You can use the CMP Cookiebot tool available on our website to manage cookies and give consent for their use.
privacyPolicy.cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
privacyPolicy.cookiePolicy.bullets.1: In the Apple Safari browser: go to the "Privacy" section in the "Preferences" menu, then to the "Cookies and website data" tab.
privacyPolicy.cookiePolicy.bullets.2: In the Google Chrome browser: go to the "Privacy" section in the "Settings" menu, and then to the "Content settings" subsection and the "Cookies and site data" tab.
privacyPolicy.cookiePolicy.bullets.3: In the Microsoft Internet Explorer browser: open the "Tools" menu, go to the "Internet Options" tab, then to "Browsing History," "Settings," and "View files."
privacyPolicy.cookiePolicy.bullets.4: In the Mozilla Firefox browser: open the "Tools" menu, go to the "Options" section, then to the "Privacy" subsection, and select the dedicated function "Remove specific cookies".
privacyPolicy.cookiePolicy.p1: You can also configure cookie handling through the Network Advertising Initiative website or your internet browser settings to block or receive a warning before installing any cookie file. Instructions vary depending on the browser, but can usually be found in the "Help" menu. Browser settings can be changed independently on each device you use.
privacyPolicy.disableComputer.title: How to disable "cookies" on a computer?
privacyPolicy.disableComputer.intro: To disable or delete "cookies" files, you can follow the instructions below:
privacyPolicy.disableComputer.bullets.1: On Android devices: Go to the "Privacy and security" section in the browser settings and select options related to clearing cache, passwords, cookies, and form data. You can also configure these functions not to save "cookies" files.
privacyPolicy.disableComputer.bullets.2: In the Google Chrome browser on Android devices: Go to settings in the "Advanced options" category and select "Clear browsing data" to remove selected data.
privacyPolicy.disableComputer.bullets.3: On devices with iOS 8: Go to settings, choose the "Safari" tab, then "Block cookies" and adjust the settings according to your preferences. For iOS 7 or earlier, you can select the option "Never for third-party websites and advertisers".
privacyPolicy.disableComputer.note: However, it is worth remembering that uninstalling or blocking cookie files used by websites can affect the usability of these websites or even make it impossible to use them.
privacyPolicy.disableMobile.title: How to deactivate "cookies" file support on a mobile device?
privacyPolicy.disableMobile.p1: (See instructions in the section above: How to disable "cookies" on a computer? – the mobile instructions are included there.)
privacyPolicy.tools.title: Tools used on the Boxmag website
privacyPolicy.tools.analytics.label: Google Analytics:
privacyPolicy.tools.analytics.desc: On the Boxmag website, we use Google Analytics, which is a web analysis service provided by Google Inc. Google Analytics uses cookies to collect information about how the website is used. This data is typically transmitted and stored on Google servers in the USA. However, by anonymizing IP addresses on websites, the user's IP address is shortened before being sent to Google servers. Google uses this information on behalf of the website operator to evaluate its usage, create reports on website activity, and provide other services related to website traffic and internet usage. IP addresses transmitted by Google Analytics are not linked to other data stored by Google. The collected data includes IP addresses, network location, visit date, operating system, and browser type. You can disable cookies through the appropriate browser settings, but this may limit the functionality of the website.
privacyPolicy.tools.ads.label: Google Ads:
privacyPolicy.tools.ads.desc: Boxmag uses the Google Conversion Tracking service, which utilizes cookies set by Google on the user's computer when they click on an ad served by Google. The cookies expire after 30 days and are not used for personal identification. Google and Boxmag may track user activity on the website after clicking on the ad. The information collected through these cookies is used to generate referral statistics for advertisers using Google Ads services. Users are not identified by advertisers.
privacyPolicy.tools.facebook.label: Measurement of changes using Facebook pixel:
privacyPolicy.tools.facebook.desc: Boxmag uses the Facebook pixel, also known as the Facebook pixel, provided by Facebook Inc. This pixel allows tracking of user actions after clicking on an ad on Facebook. Data collected using the pixel is anonymous and does not contain personal information. Facebook may link this data to the user's Facebook account and use it for advertising purposes. Users can block ads on Facebook and beyond. Consent to use this tool can only be given by individuals over the age of 13. If a user is a minor, they need the consent of a guardian. To learn more about Facebook's compliance with data protection regulations in Europe, you can click on the appropriate link.
privacyPolicy.tools.trusted.label: Integration in the Trusted shops:
privacyPolicy.tools.trusted.beforeUrl: In order to present our Trusted Shops Quality Seal, as well as customer reviews and Trusted Shops product offerings available to buyers after placing an order, our website is integrated with the Trusted Shops;

reg.procedureTitle: IV. Procedure for concluding a Sales Agreement

reg.extraGuaranteesTitle: IX. Additional guarantees when selling Goods in the Store
reg.eServicesTitle: X. Complaints regarding the provision of electronic services
reg.outOfCourtTitle: XI. Out-of-court complaint and redress procedures
reg.introDefs: The terms used in the Regulations shall mean:
reg.defCustomerDesc: a natural person, legal person, or organizational unit without legal personality, granted legal capacity by specific provisions, who places an Order as part of the Store.
reg.defConsumerDesc: defined in accordance with Civil Code, law 287/2009, as a natural person who concludes a legal transaction with an entrepreneur not directly related to their business or professional activity.
reg.defCivilCodeDesc: refers to Law 287/2009 and subsequent amendments.
reg.defRegulationsDesc: these Regulations define the general terms and conditions of sale and the rules for the provision of electronic services as part of the boxmag.eu Online Store.
reg.defOnlineStoreDesc: an online service available at boxmag.eu, through which the Customer may place Orders.
reg.defGoodsDesc: refers to products presented in the Online Store.
reg.defSalesAgreementDesc: a contract for the sale of Goods within the meaning of the Civil Code, concluded between boxmag.eu and the Customer, using the Store's website.
reg.defConsumerRightsActDesc: refers to Law 363/2007, directive 85/577/CEE on consumer rights.
reg.defActElectronic: Act on the provision of electronic services
reg.defActElectronicDesc: refers to law 365/2002, regarding electronic services.
reg.defOrderDesc: the Customer's declaration of intent, aimed directly at the conclusion of the Sales Agreement, specifying in particular the type and quantity of the Goods.
reg.gen1: These Regulations define the rules for using the Online Store available at boxmag.eu.
reg.gen2: These Regulations are the Regulations referred to in law 365/2002 (as amended) regarding electronic services.
reg.gen3: boxmag.eu is part of REKO Packaging s.r.l., Stefan cel Mare 131 street, 725400 Radauti, Suceava, VAT NR. RO4534966, registered at the Chamber of Commerce with nr. J33/1437/1993.
reg.gen4: These Regulations define in particular: the rules for registering and using an account as part of the Online Store; the terms and conditions for placing Orders electronically as part of the Online Store; the rules for concluding Sales Agreements using the services provided as part of the Online Store.
reg.gen5: In accordance with applicable law, boxmag.eu reserves the right to limit the provision of services via the Online Store to persons over the age of 18. In this case, potential customers will be notified.
reg.gen6: Customers can access these Terms and Conditions at any time via a link on the home page of the boxmag.eu website and download and print them.
reg.rulesRegTitle: Registration in the Online Store is optional.
reg.rulesRegBody: Registration requires accepting the regulations and providing mandatory personal data. Boxmag.eu may revoke a customer's right to use the store if the customer provides untrue data, infringes on third-party personal rights, or engages in behaviour inconsistent with applicable law or harming Boxmag.eu's reputation. A deprived user cannot re-register without prior consent.
reg.rulesSecurity: In order to ensure the security of the transmission of messages and data, the Online Store implements technical and organizational measures to prevent unauthorized persons from obtaining and modifying personal data transmitted via the internet.
reg.rulesObligTitle: The Customer is obliged in particular to:
reg.rulesObligBody: use the Online Store in a manner consistent with Romanian law, the regulations, and general internet principles; not provide or transfer prohibited content (e.g. promoting violence, defamation, violating personal rights); use the Online Store without interfering with its functioning, in particular not using specific software/devices or sending unsolicited commercial information (spam); use the Online Store in a way that is not inconvenient for other customers and for Boxmag.eu; use any content posted as part of the Online Store only for personal use.
reg.rulesInvoices: The customer agrees to receive invoices in an electronic version.
reg.procSelBody: Go to boxmag.eu, select goods, and follow on-screen instructions.
reg.procBasketBody: Selecting goods involves adding them to a basket.
reg.procModBody: Customers can modify entered data and selected goods before confirming the order, guided by website information.
reg.procSumBody: After providing necessary data, an order summary will be shown, including goods/services description, total price, and other costs.
reg.procConfBody: Accepting regulations, providing mandatory personal data, and pressing the confirmation button sends the order.
reg.procConcBody: Goods information is an offer; sending an order is a declaration to conclude a sales agreement with boxmag.eu according to the regulations. The agreement is concluded upon receipt of the order by the online store's IT system, followed by email confirmation of essential elements.
reg.procAccess: Customers can access, download, and print Terms and Conditions via a homepage link. Confirmation of essential sales agreement provisions occurs via email.
reg.deliv1: Delivery is carried out according to information at:
reg.deliv2: Delivery costs will be indicated during order placement and finalized in the basket.
reg.deliv3: Store pickup is available from Boxmag, Stefan cel Mare 131 street RO-725400 Radauti, Suceava, Monday to Friday 8:00–16:30, excluding public holidays.
reg.deliv4: Orders can be picked up after prepayment and an email confirming readiness.
reg.deliv5: Orders are processed only after payment confirmation.
reg.deliv6: Paid orders are processed Monday to Friday during warehouse working hours.
reg.deliv7: Order completion depends on stock availability. Estimated delivery times are in product cards. 24-hour shipping executes by the next business day; up to 5 business days shipping executes by the fourth business day. Final delivery time depends on the carrier and delivery location.
reg.deliv8: For consumer distance purchases, damage to goods during delivery: the store bears the risk. Report obvious damage to the deliverer and contact the store. Delays in reporting do not affect statutory claims but faster notification helps in claims against the carrier.
reg.deliv9: For non-consumer customers, the risk of damage or loss transfers from the online store to the buyer when goods are entrusted to a carrier designated by the buyer.
reg.prices1: The prices of the Goods are quoted in RON and EUR in accordance with the User's settings. Payments are accepted in currencies that the User chooses from the available list in the Store in accordance with their preferences.
reg.prices3: The Customer has the option of paying for the Order with the payment methods listed in the How to buy tab available at
reg.prices4: The Order Fee is charged after placing the Order.
reg.prices5: Only paid Orders are accepted for execution.
reg.withdrawalP1: You have the right to withdraw from this Agreement within 14 days without giving any reason. The withdrawal period expires 14 days after the date on which you came into possession of the last batch or part or on which a third party other than the carrier and indicated by you came into possession of the last batch or part.
reg.withdrawalP2: To exercise your right of withdrawal, you must inform us (Boxmag, Stefan cel Mare 131 street RO-725400 Radauti, Suceava, info@boxmag.eu, Telephone: +40 799 553 345) of your decision to withdraw from this Agreement by means of an unequivocal statement (for example, a letter sent by post or e-mail). You can use the model withdrawal form, but it is not mandatory.
reg.withdrawalP3: To meet the deadline for withdrawal from the Agreement, it is sufficient to send information regarding the exercise of your right to withdraw before the deadline.
reg.wConsP1: All payments, including delivery costs (excluding additional costs from non-cheapest delivery methods), will be reimbursed within 14 days of being informed of the withdrawal. The refund will use the same payment methods, and no fees will be incurred. A refund may be withheld until the item is received or proof of shipment is provided.
reg.wConsP2: Return address: Boxmag, Stefan cel Mare 131 street RO-725400 Radauti, Suceava. The item must be sent or handed over immediately, and no later than 14 days from the date of withdrawal notification. The deadline is met if the item is sent before the 14-day period expires. The consumer will bear the direct costs of returning the item and is only responsible for the diminished value if the item was used in a way unnecessary to establish its nature, characteristics, and functioning.
reg.wConsExcludeTitle: The right to withdraw from the Agreement by the Consumer is excluded in the case of:
reg.wConsExcludeItem: Contracts in which the subject of the service is a non-prefabricated item, manufactured according to the Consumer's specifications or serving to satisfy his individual needs.
reg.mfIntro: (This form should be completed and returned only if you want to withdraw from the contract.)
reg.mfAddressee: Addressee: Boxmag, Stefan cel Mare 131 street RO-725400 Radauti, Suceava, info@boxmag.eu, Telephone: +40 799 553 345
reg.mfInform: I inform about my withdrawal from the sales contract of the following things
reg.mfDate: Date of conclusion of the contract/receipt
reg.mfConsumerSig: Consumer's signature (only if the form is submitted on paper)
reg.compGoodsP1: The seller is obliged to deliver Goods free from defects. The statutory right of liability for defects of the item sold (warranty for defects) applies according to law 365/2002 and the Civil Code. Anyone making a purchase from the Shop has the right to make a warranty claim.
reg.compInWriting: In writing: to Boxmag, Stefan cel Mare 131 street RO-725400 Radauti, Suceava
reg.compGoodsP2: If a complaint needs consideration under warranty, the customer is obliged to deliver the defective Goods to the postal address indicated above at our expense. If, due to the type of Goods or the way they are installed, the delivery of the Goods would be excessively difficult, you are obliged to make them available to us in the place where they are located. We undertake to respond to the complaint immediately, no later than within 14 days from the date of its submission.
reg.compRecTitle: Recommended information when submitting a complaint:
reg.compRecBody: (1) provide information regarding the subject of the complaint, in particular the type and date of occurrence of the defect; (2) specification of the request regarding the method of removing the defect (replacement of the Goods with a new one, repair of the Goods, price reduction, withdrawal from the Agreement if the defect is significant); (3) providing contact details of the person submitting the complaint. These recommendations will facilitate and speed up the consideration of the complaint by the Store. They are non-binding guidelines only and do not affect the effectiveness of complaints submitted without providing the recommended information.
reg.extraGuarP1: Reko Packaging, Stefan cel Mare 131 street RO-725400 Radauti, Suceava is the owner of the Goods available in the boxmag.eu Store. Reko Packaging as a manufacturer provides an additional guarantee for the Goods it produces on the terms and for the period specified in the warranty card attached to the Goods. The guarantee provided by us does not exclude, limit or suspend the Customer's rights resulting from the provisions on the warranty for defects of the item sold (Point VIII of the Regulations).
reg.eSvc1: Boxmag takes steps to ensure fully correct operation of the Online Store, to the extent that results from current technical knowledge, and undertakes to remove within a reasonable time any irregularities reported by Customers.
reg.eSvc2: The Customer may notify us of any irregularities or interruptions in the functioning of the Online Store website. Irregularities related to the functioning of the Store should be reported electronically to: info@boxmag.eu.
reg.eSvc3: In a complaint regarding irregularities related to the functioning of the Online Store website, please indicate the type and date of occurrence of irregularities.
reg.eSvc4: We undertake to respond to the complaint immediately, no later than within 14 days from the date of its submission.
reg.outOfCourtP1: Possibilities exist for out-of-court complaint and redress methods, which are voluntary and require agreement from both parties. Consumers can apply for these proceedings regarding sales agreements to the Trade Inspection. The European Commission offers an online dispute resolution (ODR) platform:
reg.final1: The court competent to settle disputes with Consumers is the local court, as per the Code of Civil Procedure.
reg.final2: Any disputes between boxmag.eu and a non-consumer customer are submitted to the court competent for their registered office.
